properties.remark: SPOTTER REPORTED A SHED WAS BLOWN OVER. THE SHED HAD TWO HORSES IN IT WHEN IT WAS LIFTED AND THROWN. THE HORSES WERE NOT INJURED. THEY ESTIMATE A 60 MPH GUST FROM THE THUNDERSTORM.
WINDS ALSO BLEW OVER A WOOD AND METAL HORSE SHED.
